title: Dogfood Scenario Definition
description: Authored in source repos under dogfood/scenarios/. Defines what constitutes a real dogfood exercise for a specific product surface. Steps are descriptive (what to verify), not executable (how to automate).

scenario_id.description: Stable kebab-case ID. Referenced by policy and records. Must be unique within the repo.

scenario_version.description: Semver. Bump when steps or success criteria change.

product_surface.description: The product surface this scenario exercises.

execution_mode.description: bot: fully automated. human: manual exercise. mixed: automation + human attestation.

description.description: What this scenario proves about the product.

preconditions.description: Conditions that must be true before the scenario can run.

steps.description: Ordered steps describing the dogfood exercise.

id.description: Stable step ID. Referenced by success_criteria.required_steps and record step_results.

action.description: What the operator does in this step.

verifiable.description: Whether this step produces a checkable outcome.

expected.description: What a passing result looks like. Required if verifiable is true.

required_steps.description: Step IDs that must pass for the scenario to pass. Must reference valid step IDs.

minimum_evidence.description: Evidence types the verifier will require for this scenario.

tags.description: Freeform tags for filtering and grouping.

automation.description: Automation hints. Null means human-only scenario.

script.description: Path to automation script, relative to repo root.
